meaning: v.(以咒文)召唤,变戏法,想象vi.变戏法,施魔法vt.祈求,恳求
examples: Her grandfather taught her to conjure.
He could conjure coins from behind people's ears.
Thirteen years ago she found herself having to conjure a career from thin air.
All it takes is the right publicist to conjure the media fairy, and presto!
The latter will probably conjure horrific images in the minds of most candy lovers.
